1.gl: properly, to mark (so as to be recognized), i.e. to remember; by implication, to mention;  to be male
1.kj: [idiom] burn (incense), [idiom] earnestly, be male, (make) mention (of), be mindful, recount, record(-er), remember, make to be remembered, bring (call, come, keep, put) to (in) re
1.dv: a primitive root; also as denominative from H2145 (זָכָר)

1.gl: properly, to glitter from afar, i.e. to be eminent (as a superintendent, especially of the Temple services and its music); to be permanent
1.kj: excel, chief musician (singer), oversee(-r), set forward.
1.dv: a primitive root;  also as denominative from H5331 (נֶצַח)

1.gl: David, the youngest son of Jesse
1.dv: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loving;

2.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
2.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

2.gl: to snatch away, whether in a good or a bad sense
2.kj: [idiom] at all, defend, deliver (self), escape, [idiom] without fail, part, pluck, preserve, recover, rescue, rid, save, spoil, strip, [idiom] surely, take (out).

2.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
2.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

2.gl: to hurry; figuratively, to be eager with excitement or enjoyment

2.dv: or עֶזְרָת; (Psalm 60:11 (13); Psalm 108:12 (13)), feminine of H5828 (עֵזֶר);

3.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
3.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

3.gl: bad or (as noun) evil (natural or moral)
3.kj: adversity, affliction, bad, calamity, [phrase] displease(-ure), distress, evil((-favouredness), man, thing), [phrase] exceedingly, [idiom] great, grief(-vous), harm, heavy, hurt(-f

3.gl: to blush; figuratively, to be ashamed, disappointed; causatively, to shame, reproach
3.kj: be ashamed, be confounded, be brought to confusion (unto shame), come (be put to) shame, bring reproach.
3.dv: a primitive root (perhaps rather the same as H2658 (חָפַר) through the idea of detection);

3.gl: properly, to pale, i.e. by implication to be ashamed; also (by implication) to be disappointed or delayed
3.kj: (be, make, bring to, cause, put to, with, a-) shamed(-d), be (put to) confounded(-fusion), become dry, delay, be long.

3.gl: the hinder part; hence (adverb) behind, backward; also (as facing north) the West
3.kj: after(-ward), back (part, -side, -ward), hereafter, (be-) hind(-er part), time to come, without.

3.gl: to search out (by any method, specifically in worship or prayer); by implication, to strive after
3.kj: ask, beg, beseech, desire, enquire, get, make inquisition, procure, (make) request, require, seek (for).

4.gl: to turn back (hence, away) transitively or intransitively, literally or figuratively (not necessarily with the idea of return to the starting point); generally to retreat; often adverbial, again
4.kj: ((break, build, circumcise, dig, do anything, do evil, feed, lay down, lie down, lodge, make, rejoice, send, take, weep)) [idiom] again, (cause to) answer ([phrase] again), [idiom]
answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

4.gl: a heel, i.e. (figuratively) the last of anything (used adverbially, for ever); also result, i.e. compensation; and so (adverb with preposition or relatively) on account of
4.kj: [idiom] because, by, end, for, if, reward.
4.dv: from H6117 (עָקַב) in the sense of H6119 (עָקֵב);

4.gl: shame (the feeling and the condition, as well as its cause); by implication (specifically) an idol
4.kj: ashamed, confusion, [phrase] greatly, (put to) shame(-ful thing).

5.kj: answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

5.gl: to be (causatively make) large (in various senses, as in body, mind, estate or honor, also in pride)
5.kj: advance, boast, bring up, exceed, excellent, be(-come, do, give, make, wax), great(-er, come to... estate, [phrase] things), grow(up), increase, lift up, magnify(-ifical), be much
5.dv: a primitive root; properly, to twist (compare H1434 (גְּדִל)), i.e.

5.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
5.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

5.gl: properly, continuance (as indefinite extension); but used only (attributively as adjective) constant (or adverbially, constantly); ellipt. the regular (daily) sacrifice
5.dv: from an unused root meaning to stretch;

5.gl: to search out (by any method, specifically in worship or prayer); by implication, to strive after
5.kj: ask, beg, beseech, desire, enquire, get, make inquisition, procure, (make) request, require, seek (for).

5.gl: probably to brighten up, i.e. (figuratively) be (causatively, make) blithe or gleesome
5.kj: cheer up, be (make) glad, (have, make) joy(-ful), be (make) merry, (cause to, make to) rejoice, [idiom] very.
